# KaleidoSwap

> Trustless atomic swap protocol built natively on Bitcoin. Built for humans and AI agents alike.

KaleidoSwap is an infrastructure layer enabling trustless atomic swaps across multiple Bitcoin Layer 2 protocols, including Lightning Network, RGB, Arkade, and Spark. The RFQ (Request for Quote) model lets market makers compete on spread, providing best-execution pricing for users and integrators. Non-custodial, open source, and private by design.

---

## Products

- [KaleidoSDK](https://docs.kaleidoswap.com/sdk/introduction.md): Multi-language SDK (Rust core, TypeScript and Python bindings). MCP-compatible. For wallet builders, multi-L2 wallet builders, neobanks, and AI agent developers.
- [Kaleido CLI](https://docs.kaleidoswap.com/cli/introduction.md): Command-line tool for managing local RGB Lightning nodes and executing swaps directly from the terminal. Ships with KaleidoSDK.
- [Desktop App](https://docs.kaleidoswap.com/desktop-app/getting-started/introduction.md): Tauri-based (Rust + web frontend). Full self-hosted RGB Lightning node. Non-custodial. Available on macOS, Linux, and Windows.
- [Browser Extension](https://docs.kaleidoswap.com/extensions/kaleidoswap-extension/introduction.md): Multi-network Multi-Protocol Bitcoin wallet extension. RGB Lightning Node and DApp connectivity.
- KaleidoAgent: Autonomous AI agent built on KaleidoSDK. Manages Lightning wallets, executes swaps, handles DCA and rebalancing autonomously.
- KaleidoMaker: Production-grade market-maker infrastructure. RFQ engine, turnkey LP stack, FastAPI with Prometheus/Grafana/Loki observability. Launching Q4 2026.

---

## Supported Protocols

- Bitcoin (onchain)
- Lightning Network
- RGB Protocol on Lightning (RGB20 assets: USDT, XAUT, and others)
- Spark (statechains, USDB stablecoin)
- Arkade / Ark (virtual UTXOs)
- Liquid Network (planned Q2 2026)
- Taproot Assets (planned Q3 2026)
- Fedimint (planned Q4 2026)

---
